zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick於1388年11月9日出生在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安波爾維其可時，她的父親William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick11385歲，母親Margaret de la Haye26歲。她於大約1408年與Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安波爾維其可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1464年6月14日在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安武坡 堂 本 薩爾圖享年75歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安海利斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick于1388年11月9日出生在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安波爾維其可时，她的父亲William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick11385岁，母亲Margaret de la Haye26岁。她于大约1408年与Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安波爾維其可结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1464年6月14日在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安武坡 堂 本 薩爾圖享年75岁，埋葬在苏格兰米德洛迪安海利斯。

nameMeanings.name: Borthwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the old barony of Borthwick, formerly Loquhariot (Midlothian) and possibly also from Borthwick (Roxburghshire). The placenames are from Old English bord ‘board, table’ + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick was born on 9 November 1388, in Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick, was 11385 and her mother, Margaret de la Haye, was 26. She married Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun about 1408, in Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 14 June 1464, in Upper Town of Saltoun, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.Upper Town of Saltoun, , Haddingtonshire: Upper Town of Saltoun, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick est née le 9 novembre 1388, à Borthwick, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick, avait 11385 ans et sa mère, Margaret de la Haye, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun environ 1408, à Borthwick, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 14 juin 1464, à Upper Town of Saltoun, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Hailes, Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick am 9. November 1388 in Borthwick, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick 11385 und ihre Mutter Margaret de la Haye 26. Sie hat um 1408 in Borthwick, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 14. Juni 1464 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Upper Town of Saltoun, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick è nata il il 9 novembre 1388 nel Borthwick, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick, aveva 11385 anni e sua madre, Margaret de la Haye, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun circa 1408, nel Borthwick, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 14 giugno 1464, nel Upper Town of Saltoun, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet William Borthwick of Borthwickが1388年11月9日にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンボルスウィックで生まれた時，父William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwickは11385歳，母Margaret de la Hayeは26歳であった。約1408年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンボルスウィックでSir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltounと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1464年6月14日にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンウップエル トウン オフ サルトウンで75歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンヘイレスにて埋葬された。

ko.Upper Town of Saltoun, , Haddingtonshire: 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 업퍼 타운 프 살토우
ko.lifeSummary: Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick(이)가 1388년 11월 9일 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 볼스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick(은)는 11385세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de la Haye(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1408년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 볼스윅에서 Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1464년 6월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 업퍼 타운 프 살토우에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 하일레스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick nasceu em 9 de novembro de 1388, em Borthwick, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick, tinha 11385 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de la Haye, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun aproximadamente 1408, em Borthwick, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 14 de junho de 1464, em Upper Town of Saltoun, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.Upper Town of Saltoun, , Haddingtonshire: уппир тоун оф салтоун, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick родилась 9 ноября 1388 г. в местности бортвикк, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick было 11385 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de la Haye, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun около 1408 г. в местности бортвикк, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 14 июня 1464 г. в местности уппир тоун оф салтоун, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности хеилесь, мидлотян, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick nació el 9 de noviembre de 1388, en Borthwick, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick, tenía 11385 años y su mamá, Margaret de la Haye, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun aproximadamente 1408, en Borthwick, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 14 de junio de 1464, en Upper Town of Saltoun, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland.
